name: Lotus 14mm Bowl Adapter
summary: Lotus 14mm Bowl Adapter — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Lotus 14 mm Bowl Adapter opens up the full potential of the Lotus vaporiser by allowing smooth, water-cooled sessions through any compatible glass piece. Precision-crafted from durable glass, it ensures a secure fit and enhances every draw with cleaner, cooler, and more flavorful vapour. Engineered to fit all standard 14 mm female joints, this adapter seamlessly connects the Lotus cap to a wide range of bubblers, water pipes, and rigs. Its versatile design makes it an essential accessory for customers who prefer filtered vapour and expanded device functionality. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
